imageUrl.title: Image URL
imageUrl.description: URL of the image to process (JPG, PNG, WebP)

imageUrls.title: Batch Image URLs
imageUrls.description: Process multiple images: array of URLs. Overrides imageUrl if provided.

mode.title: Output Mode
mode.description: transparent = PNG with alpha. white = white background. composite = new bg + shadow.

backgroundUrl.title: Composite Background URL
backgroundUrl.description: URL of background image to use in composite mode

addShadow.title: Add Realistic Shadow
addShadow.description: Add drop shadow in composite mode

enhance.title: Auto-Enhance
enhance.description: Apply auto-contrast, brightness normalization after removal
